title: Manufacturing Engineer - Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates!
